# stalwart_domain (Resource)

Registers a domain in Stalwart Mail Server.

-> The provider **refuses to delete** a domain that still has users or groups
   with email addresses on it. It will list the offending principals by name so
   you know exactly what to remove first.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "stalwart_domain" "example" {
  name        = "example.com"
  description = "My business domain"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Domain name, e.g. example.com.

### Optional

- `description` (String) Human-readable label for this domain.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Resource identifier (same as name).

## Import

Domains can be imported using the domain name:

```shell
terraform import stalwart_domain.example example.com
```
